creator: vince@WURLDLINK.NET
text:
ports/net/net-snmp build fails even with the latest cvs.  /usr/share/mk/*.mk
has been updated with /usr/ports/Mk

How-To-Repeat: 
root@oahu [2:18am][/usr/ports/net/net-snmp] >> make
===>  ucd-snmp-4.2 : Your system is too old to use this bsd.port.mk. You need a fresh make world or an upgrade kit. Please go to http://www.FreeBSD.org/ports/ or a mirror site and follow the instructions.
